signals.headline: Mavericks Rookie Cooper Flagg Scores 51 Points, Becomes First Teen in NBA History to Hit 50+ | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Mavericks Rookie Cooper Flagg Scores 51 Points, Becomes First Teen in NBA History to Hit 50+ | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Dallas Mavericks rookie **Cooper Flagg** (19) scored 51 points in a 138-127 loss to the Orlando Magic, marking the first time a teenager has reached 50+ points in an NBA game.[2]

signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecasts.[1]**

signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Explodes in Tweet Markets | NO | MED confidence**  
"Elon Musk # tweets April 10 - April 17, 2026?" leads with 88% odds on 300-319 tweets, $13M volume, $3M today, and $2M liquidity, suggesting traders tracking his activity closely as the period nears end[3].
